issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as pagination beyond the first page or handling rate limits.
The skill contains verbose explanatory comments that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment with fetch and Buffer, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: bulk-stale-report
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used v2 search without pagination or >30d flag; treatment paginated POST /rest/api/3/search with status!=Done and updated<=-14d JQL, grouped by assignee, and flagged >30 days as critical.

scenarios.name: epic-cascade-webhook
scenarios.rationale: Baseline skipped webhook registration, hardcoded transition IDs, and used parent= instead of Epic Link; treatment registered via POST /webhook, inspected changelog status->Done, used "Epic Link" JQL, and fetched transitions dynamically per child.
